summary: ML Engineer with hands-on experience in adversarial robustness, computer vision, and NLP systems. Pursuing M.Tech in AI/ML with a focus on uncertainty estimation and model reliability. Author of 3 IEEE/IJRASET peer-reviewed publications and 1 Taylor & Francis book chapter. Passionate about building production-grade ML pipelines for real-world problems.

points: Resolved system-level bugs and hardware compatibility issues across Ubuntu releases.
Contributed patches and documentation; coordinated with upstream maintainers.
Implemented feature modules for an open-source audio processing project.
Reviewed peer pull requests under mentorship.

education.org: Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies
